text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Air Groove is hard at work, her old
acquaintance Silence Suzuka is also garnering
attention from the racing world at large.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them enter a scrimmage, where Air
Groove loses utterly to this Umamusume known
as the Otherworldly Front-Runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Identifying Silence Suzuka as a major obstacle to
overcome, Air Groove makes it her next goal to
defeat her at the Osaka Hai.
